options.gql.broadcasts: query($groupId: ID!){ broadcasts(groupId:$groupId){ id title body deadline requiresAck acked eventId } }
options.gql.inbox: query($groupId: ID!){ inboxItems(groupId:$groupId){ id kind title subtitle deadline isUrgent priority eventId } }
options.gql.activities: query($groupId: ID!){ activities(groupId:$groupId){ kind title subtitle timestamp } }
options.gql.clock: query($groupId: ID!){ clockRecords(groupId:$groupId){ id site time status } }
options.gql.attendance: query($groupId: ID!){ attendanceSnapshot(groupId:$groupId){ courseName attendanceTime validDuration stats{attended absent late total} personalRecords{ courseName date status } } }
options.gql.esg: query($groupId: ID!){ esgSummary(groupId:$groupId){ progress monthlyReduction records{ id title subtitle timestamp } } }
options.gql.insights: query($groupId: ID!){ insights(groupId:$groupId){ id title entries{ id category title value trend } } }
